sglang.title: [Feature] add aligned_vector type for JIT kernel
sglang.author: DarkSharpness
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

We learn from designs of flashinfer and add a similar vec_t. It can be used for aligned load/store without having to write dangerous reinterpret_cast.
Modifications
Implement a flashinfer-like aligned_vector for global memory access (improve qk-norm kernel by 2% in large bs)

Accuracy Te

sglang.title: [Refactor] Clean up custom op
sglang.author: DarkSharpness
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

We observe that there're many direct use torch.ops.sglang in code, which is not friendly to IDE (especially for type checking). This is a result of custom op registration. Currently, registering a custom op requires:

Define the custom op example_op.
Define a fake implementation.
Call di

vllm.title: Add Multimodal Processor Benchmark
vllm.author: reaganjlee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Resolves #24171.
Purpose
This PR adds in a benchmark for the multimodal processor. This tests for the MM processor on a single vllm instance on a single GPU.
Originally, I planned to additionally test for 1. DP on multiple GPUs and 2. multiple instances on a single GPU. On second thought, testing 1.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Replace BaseException with specific exceptions in FLA utils
vllm.author: c0de128
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Change except BaseException: to except (RuntimeError, AttributeError): in get_available_device() function.
Details
BaseException catches SystemExit, KeyboardInterrupt, and GeneratorExit which should propagate normally. The triton driver access can raise:

RuntimeError: If triton backend is n

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Fix failure in Language Models Tests (Extra Standard) by reducing agent pool size
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The "Language Models Tests (Extra Standard)" job on AMD CI was failing with exit code 5, even though all tests passed successfully.
Root cause: The mi325_8 agent pool has 8 GPUs, and the AMD CI script shards tests across all available GPUs (8 shards). However, there are only ~19 tests matching the '

vllm.author: zhima771

Purpose
This PR adds LoRA support for the Language Model component of DeepSeek-OCR.

vllm serve \

  --tenso

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix block size used in EAGLE slot mapping
vllm.author: benchislett
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Some hybrid models use a different block size for the linear and attention layers. In such cases, vllm_config.cache_config.block_size is not the same as the block size needed for EAGLE.
This leads to subtle issues in the slot mapping computed by EAGLE, and causes crashes for long-context or high-con

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Fix ModernBERT token classification test
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes ModernBERT token classification test failure on ROCm by using eager attention for HuggingFace inference.
Problem
On ROCm, HuggingFace Transformers' flash attention implementation produces numerically different results compared to vLLM's FlexAttention backend, causing the test_modernbert_models

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Hardware][AMD] Fix last_page_len calculation in AITER MLA decode
vllm.author: c0de128
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Fixes incorrect paged_kv_last_page_len calculation in the ROCm AITER MLA decode path.
The Bug
The AITER MLA kernel uses a block size of 1 (each page contains exactly 1 token). However, the paged_kv_last_page_len was incorrectly set to the full sequence length:
# BEFORE (buggy):
paged_kv_last
